completed_steps.summary: Full rescan: re-read all 12 .rs files (now ~3203 LOC). New core float.rs (eval_float, f64_to_value); EvalError::BitwiseInFloatMode added; tests 35->43. GUI gained NumberMode (int/float), ViewMode (compact/full/custom), bit bar + index markers, bit-range extractor, fixed-point fill bar, expanded persistence. Wayland eframe feature dropped (x11 only); screenshot feature added.

Updated in place: index, project-overview, source-tree-analysis, architecture-core, architecture-gui, api-contracts-core, component-inventory-gui, integration-architecture, development-guide, project-parts.json. cargo test green (43 passed).

findings.technology_stack: Rust 2021; nybble-core (no deps); nybble-gui (eframe/egui 0.34, glow, x11)

resume_instructions: Workflow complete (full rescan 2026-06-23). Re-run to rescan or deep-dive.
